disallowed_cidrs.description: A list of CIDR blocks that should not be assigned when previewing the next CIDR from the IPAM pool.

ipam_pool_id.description: The ID of the IPAM pool from which to preview the next available CIDR.

netmask_length.description: The netmask length for the CIDR block to preview. This defines the size of the CIDR block.
